name: cc-plugin-codex
description: Run Claude Code reviews for Codex-managed changes, with separate review-only and review-and-fix workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Ask Claude Code to review the current git diff.
interface.longDescription: CC Plugin Codex adds Claude-backed review workflows for Codex. The bundled claude-only-review skill reports Claude findings with Codex comments on each point, while claude-review-and-fix reviews the current git diff and lets Codex fix confirmed actionable issues.
defaultPrompt: Run claude-only-review for the current diff.
Run claude-review-and-fix for the current diff.
